results.title: CM Afridi appreciates excellent arrangements for peaceful observance of Ashura
results.description: Suhail Afridi reaffirmed provincial government's commitment to continuing all possible efforts to protect lives and property of the public and to ensure the peaceful conduct of religious gatherings.

results.title: 2026 Fed Cup belongs to Ikorodu City, not El-Kanemi Warriors
results.description: On Saturday, July 11, relegated El-Kanemi Warriors will battle Ikorodu City in this year’s Federation Cup final at the Stephen Keshi Stadium in Asaba, Delta State. The upcoming encounter is a classic battle of tradition versus ambition, pitting cup pedigree against giant-killers. Indeed, it is a contest that matches an established, multi-titled powerhouse against a [...]

results.title: I never thought I’d see this in New York: rabbis lament Israel critics backed by Mamdani
Sonia slams Modi govt's 'stony silence' on Gaza 'genocide', says it can't be explained rationally or morally
results.description: Sonia Gandhi strongly criticised the Modi government's silence on the "Gaza genocide," deeming it morally reprehensible and detrimental to India's national interest. She argues that India has alienated historical allies and global public opinion, allowing Pakistan to gain influence. Gandhi highlights UN reports detailing alleged Israeli actions and the tragic case of Hind Rajab, urging India to uphold humanitarian values and reclaim its independent foreign policy.

results.title: Who in Tennessee’s Children’s Special Services program could be reported?
results.description: As a Davidson County judge has temporarily blocked Tennessee from reporting information about people who get services from Children’s Special Services.
